summary: A confident, well-toned AI-infrastructure portfolio landing page with strong visual identity, undercut by a soft CTA hierarchy that lets the primary action compete with secondary links.
primary_issues: The primary CTA shares visual weight with two secondary links in the hero, so there is no single obvious next step.
The above-the-fold headline communicates tone well but is a half-beat slow on stating exactly what the offering is.
recommended_fixes: Make the primary CTA the single dominant element in the hero and demote the secondary links to text.
Tighten the headline to name the offering in plain terms, with the tonal line as the subhead.
next_action: Restructure the hero CTA hierarchy and headline, validate on mobile, then re-audit conversion strength.
